soloModes.title: Procedural skirmish (urban)
soloModes.description: Random 16×12 urban map: river, fords, two flanking routes, buildings, and CraftPix props.

soloModes.title: Procedural skirmish (desert)
soloModes.description: Random 16×12 desert map: oasis channel, fords, dunes, and theme props (no urban building footprints).

soloModes.title: Battle mat lab
soloModes.description: Pick mat surface (grass / desert / urban), choose 1–8 units, then fight on the plane-over-grid stack with dense props.

soloModes.title: Map theater
soloModes.description: Pick one of 20 battlefields for skirmish or hotseat.

soloModes.title: Training Academy
soloModes.description: Pick 3 units — forest LOS, flanking encouraged.

soloModes.title: Trial: Defend
soloModes.description: Survive 4 rounds. Hills and urban sap sight.

soloModes.title: Vs CPU (setup)
soloModes.description: Choose your map and squad in any order, then start the battle.

soloModes.title: Target: AI Engaged
soloModes.description: Asymmetric AI encounter — survive contact and counterattack.

soloModes.title: Urban Assault
soloModes.description: City streets, tight corridors, restricted LOS.

soloModes.title: River Crossing
soloModes.description: Two bridges, one river. Control the crossings.
